name: Salmon-And-Pasta-Stuffed Tomatoes (186-calories)
recipeIngredient: 1 7 1/2 oz can salmon, drained, flaked, skin-bones removed
3 tbsp reduced calorie mayonnaise OR salad dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions. Drain; set aside.
2. Combine salmon, yogurt, cucumber, carrot, mayonnaise or salad dressing, dill weed, 1/4 teaspoon salt, and 1/4 teaspoon pepper in a bowl. Toss with pasta until evenly coated.
3. Cover and chill for 4 to 24 hours in the refrigerator.
4. To prepare tomato cups:
a. Cut out about half an inch from the top of each tomato using a spoon or a small knife, being careful not to remove all the way to the stem end.
b. Invert each tomato so that the cut side is facing up.
5. For each tomato cup, gently spread 6 wedges slightly apart on the plate.
6. Fill each tomato cup with the salmon pasta mixture.
7. Makes 4 servings.
Nutrition information per serving: 186 calories, 15 g protein, 19 g carbohydrates, 6 g fat, 3 mg cholesterol, 452 mg sodium, 570 mg potassium
